mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_message_template (template_code, template_name, template_content, message_type, status, create_by, create_time, deleted, remark) VALUES (#{templateCode}, #{templateName}, #{templateContent}, #{messageType}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, 0, #{remark})
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_message_template
template_code = #{templateCode}, template_name = #{templateName}, template_content = #{templateContent}, message_type = #{messageType}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_message_template SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_message_template WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM sys_message_template WHERE template_code = #{templateCode} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_message_template WHERE template_code = #{templateCode} AND deleted = 0
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sys_message_template WHERE template_code = #{templateCode} AND deleted = 1
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_message_template WHERE status = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
